title: 「without + V-ing」句型
titleEn: Using without + V-ing to express an omitted action or requirement

omissions: The PDF title has no separate English subtitle; titleEn is an editorial translation.

formula: Subject + main verb + without + V-ing + other information

formulas.formula: Subject + main verb + without + V-ing + other information
Subject + main verb + without + noun / pronoun + V-ing + other information

example: Culture cannot be understood without learning the local language.
exampleZh: 不學習當地語言，便無法理解當地文化。

examples.en: Culture cannot be understood without learning the local language.
examples.zh: 不學習當地語言，便無法理解當地文化。
examples.highlight: Culture cannot be understood without learning the local language.

zh: 當一件事在沒有進行另一個動作的情況下發生，或某件事必須先做才能完成另一件事時，可使用 without + V-ing。

rules.zh: 使用 without 後，動詞必須轉為 -ing 形式。

rules.en: Use without being + past participle for a passive meaning.
rules.zh: 如要表達被動意思，可使用 without being + past participle。
examples: The report was submitted without being checked.
報告未經檢查便被提交。

rules.en: State the performer when the two actions have different subjects.
rules.zh: 如兩個動作由不同的人或事物進行，可使用 without + noun / pronoun + V-ing。
examples: The match continued without the captain playing.
隊長沒有上場，比賽仍繼續進行。

rules.en: Use without having to + base verb when something is unnecessary.
rules.zh: 如要表達「無須做某事」，可使用 without having to + base verb。
examples: She entered without having to wait.

benefits.en: This structure helps you combine two ideas into one smoother sentence instead of repeatedly using but, and did not, or if…not.
benefits.zh: 這個句型可把兩個意思合併成一句更流暢的句子，避免反覆使用 but、and did not 或 if…not。

benefits.en: It clearly shows what someone did not do, what was missing, or what must happen first.
benefits.zh: 它能清楚說明某人沒有做甚麼、缺少了甚麼，或必須先做甚麼。

benefits.en: It is especially useful for describing mistakes, rules, warnings, achievements, and everyday situations.
benefits.zh: 它特別適合用來描述錯誤、規則、警告、成就和日常情況。

sourceOmissions: The PDF title has no separate English subtitle; titleEn is an editorial translation.

en: Rewrite each sentence using without + V-ing.
Preserve the original meaning and tense.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 without + V-ing 改寫以下句子。
保留原句的意思和時態。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Mia left home, but she did not eat breakfast.
questions.promptZh: 米婭離開了家，但她沒有吃早餐。
questions.answer: Mia left home without eating breakfast.
questions.answerZh: 米婭沒有吃早餐便離開了家。
questions.highlight: Mia left home without eating breakfast.

questions.prompt: Ben answered the question although he had not checked it carefully.

questions.prompt: A good discussion is impossible if people do not listen respectfully to different opinions.
questions.promptZh: 如果人們不以尊重的態度聆聽不同意見，便不可能有良好的討論。

questions.prompt: Culture cannot be fully understood if a person does not learn the local language and observe daily life.
questions.promptZh: 如果一個人不學習當地語言和觀察日常生活，便不能充分理解當地文化。
questions.answer: Culture cannot be fully understood without learning the local language and observing daily life.
questions.answerZh: 不學習當地語言和觀察日常生活，便無法充分理解當地文化。
